brand_voice_note: Confident and practical Aussie water-filtration specialist that talks in plain, functional benefits while leaning on guarantees and complete home solutions.

concepts.product_title: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market - AWESOME WATER®
concepts.primary_text:
Worried about what's actually in your tap water?

Our Ceramic Fluoride Dome Filter is built for fluoride reduction and cleaner everyday drinking water. Run it on its own or slot it into your complete home filtration setup.

Better water from the very next glass. Just $120.
concepts.headline: Fluoride Reduction, Made Simple
concepts.why_it_works: It names the everyday worry about tap water quality and positions the dome filter as the direct, affordable fix, which suits a low-cost single-product buy.

concepts.product_title: Awesome Water® - Soda Tap 3 in 1 SHOW ROOM - SALE
concepts.primary_text:
Sparkling, chilled and filtered water, straight from your tap.

The Soda Tap 3 in 1 System is now on display at our Kirrawee showroom. Come see the finishes in person, ask questions and chat to the team who install and service it.

Showroom pricing now $2,299 (was $5,900). Backed by our Price Beat Guarantee.
concepts.headline: See the Soda Tap 3 in 1 Live
concepts.why_it_works: The showroom launch is a genuine local moment to act on, and the huge display price makes the visit worth booking while it lasts.

concepts.product_title: Awesome Water® - Paragon CP-4 - Filtration System. (New 2024)
concepts.primary_text:
Cleaner, safer drinking water at the turn of a tap.

The new 2024 Paragon CP-4 is an advanced tankless under-sink system built to reduce ultra-fine particles, heavy metals, VOCs and perfluorinated forever chemicals from your water.

Now $499 (was $898), with our Price Beat Guarantee and local Aussie service behind it.
concepts.headline: Forever Chemicals Removal at Home
concepts.why_it_works: Leading with the single desirable outcome of clean, safe water on tap matches a premium under-sink buyer, and the forever chemicals angle plus real discount seals it.
